name: Shoot! Goal to the Future
original_name: シュート！Goal to the Future
overview: Atsushi Kamiya is a former captain at Kakegawa High School and the world-renowned "courageous captain" for a famous Italian soccer team. Hideto Tsuji, a student at Kakegawa High School seems uninterested in the now-weakened soccer team. Their meeting is the start of a new legend.

trailers.title: SHOOT! Goal to the Future | OFFICIAL TRAILER
